name: github.com.argoproj.argo_events.pkg.apis.events.v1alpha1.OpenWhiskTrigger
description: OpenWhiskTrigger refers to the specification of the OpenWhisk trigger.

namespace.description:
Namespace for the action.
Defaults to "_".
+optional.

parameters.name:
Parameters is the list of key-value extracted from event's payload that are applied to
the trigger resource.
+optional

payload.description: Payload is the list of key-value extracted from an event payload to construct the request payload.

version.name:
Version for the API.
Defaults to v1.
+optional
